prompt: I'm getting really bad screen tearing and flickering when using Claude Code inside tmux over VS Code Remote SSH. Can you fix this?

assertions.text: Transcript explains DEC 2026 synchronized output as the root cause
Transcript explains that tmux swallows BSU/ESU escape sequences by default
Written tmux.conf preserves existing 'set -g mouse on' without duplicating it
Transcript mentions detach/reattach advice if tearing persists
Skill was triggered by the tearing complaint (not treated as generic troubleshooting)
